programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: From lobster roll sandwiches and fresh East Coast oysters to Italian sandwiches and whoopie pies, Andrew Zimmern explores the seaside city of Portland, Maine, loaded with classic New England fare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: The locally grown traditional foods of Dubrovnik, Croatia from spit-roasted lamb and octopus salad to a smoked meat, cabbage and potatoes dish and Dalmatia-style grilled fish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: The iconic foods of Hanoi, Vietnam, including sweet-and-sour snail soup, breakfast crepes filled with ground pork and sweet-potato fritters topped with shrimp.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: From saffron-tinted risotto and warming minestrone to impossibly fluffy, fruity panettone, Andrew Zimmern shows how Milan's rich and refined dishes earned a place in the international culinary cannon.

programme.title: Unique Sweets
programme.desc: Ice cream made with liquid nitrogen; shaved ices drenched in sugary sweet concoctions; unique drinkable concoctions; cones with a surprise inside.

programme.desc: Uncovering eateries in Asheville, N.C., that are serving up desserts.

programme.desc: The 10 remaining bakers face the darker side of love with challenges dedicated to ill-fated romances; host Jesse Palmer requests they create flaky Spring Fling Napoleons and pair up in their first team challenge to create breakup cakes.

programme.desc: It's April Fool's Day in the kitchen; Jesse Palmer tasks the remaining bakers with creating fool for love tarts and embracing the holiday of pranks by serving judges Duff Goldman, Kardea Brown and Nancy Fuller cakes that look like pies.

programme.title: Emma: Natural Relief for Bloating, Constipation & Gut Imbalance
programme.desc: Tired of bloating or gut issues that won't go away?; discovering the root cause-and how Emma can help eliminate methane-producing archaea, reset digestion and restore balance naturally.

programme.title: Hear Better With Audien
programme.desc: Audien Hearing is a leader in over-the-counter hearing aids, committed to making high-quality hearing accessible to all. Discover how advanced, affordable solutions are helping more people experience better hearing every day.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.sub-title: Crepes, Indian-Spiced Meatballs and Hot Dogs
programme.desc: A husband-and-wife-owned truck in Los Angeles that is winning over Californians with crepes; a taste of Indian street food in North Carolina; a larger-than-life hot dog cart that's putting a delicious spin on the American classic.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Greater Baton Rouge State Fair for a helping of Cajun treats, like Cajun boudin tacos and pecan pie pops; basking in the lights of the Aurora Winter Festival in Toronto.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile; Dirty Bird turkey leg and a ride on a crazy midway mash-up, the Mothership; Firefighters' Indian River County Fair in Vero Beach, Fla; the Breakfast Buzz Burger; the Strawberry Lemonade Stick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: South Florida Garlic Festival in Lake Worth, Florida; claw cake burger and mojo pork pockets; toasted garlic donuts; America's favorite ballpark snack at the National Peanut Festival in Dothan, Alabama; fair food classics with a peanutty twist.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe visits the Washington County Fair in Utah for the Twisted Pickle Roll -- a deep-fried pickle sushi dream come true -- and has a little dessert in the desert with the Cookie Dough Dog. Then, he's off to the Clark County Fair in Nevada for Pretzel French Toast and the spicy Cheesy Carne Brick. Finally, Noah heads to the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee for their Southern Fried Softshell Sandwich, the Fiery Fiesta Funnel Cake and Grape Gems, a candy-coated fruity treat!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Hearty potato soup, whole-roasted stuffed pork, egg filled arepas and cheesy hot chocolate.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Unveiling the favorite flavors of Louisville; this historic town balances country classics like the Hot Brown and burgoo stew with ingenious icons like derby pie and mutton barbecue for a true taste of Americana.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits Prague, a pilsner-lover's paradise in the Czech Republic; the city's cuisine is full of hearty comfort classics like pork knuckle marinated in lager, mushroom soup, sweet plum pastries, and a lot of dumplings.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern reveals unique cooking methods and ancient recipes in Marrakesh, Morocco, including pigeon-meat pies, beef and lentil dishes cooked in bathhouses and whole lamb slow roasted in underground ovens.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: From the blistering hot pot and fiery Mapo tofu to spicy Kung Pao Chicken, Andrew Zimmern explores the famous scorching dishes that make Chengdu, China, a delicious destination.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger; slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Cake Hunters
programme.sub-title: A Tale of Two Cities Wedding Cake
programme.desc: Ryan and Noble are searching for a cake for their second wedding celebration that perfectly combines salty and sweet, along with their Chicago lives and a reflection of their original intimate Charleston wedding ceremony.

programme.title: Cake Hunters
programme.desc: Oliver, the mayor of Miami Gardens, Fla., envisions a wedding cake featuring local landmarks and his university colors, while his fiancee, tech entrepreneur Pandwe, insists on a cake with natural beauty and vintage, 1920s-era glamour.

programme.title: Cake Hunters
programme.desc: The theme of Dan and Brittany's wedding is rustic meets glam, and even though their wedding is in a rustic barn, finding a cake with enough glamorous details to make Brittany happy is taking these two on a delicious journey to find the perfect cake.

programme.title: Cake Hunters
programme.desc: High-fashioned southern belle Grace is looking for an over-the-top cake, but her husband-to-be, Jeremy, wants to pay tribute to his late father by keeping it close to his country roots.
